events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON. Let's reason: scenario: forms not oiled, work rough-complete, commercial concrete formwork, ACI 347 reference. Need estimate measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. Forms not oiled: release agent required per ACI 347 to prevent concrete adhesion, facilitate stripping, reduce surface defects. At rough-complete before pour, condition is installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail because non-compliant and will cause concrete quality/defects/stripping issues. Risk? medium? Could result in poor finish, form damage, repair. Not life-safety immediate but high quality/financial? ACI 347 non-compliance. The task says if dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Risk likely medium or high. Use component_conditions installed-defective and non-compliant. Percent complete ~85? rough-complete. Findings: forms lack required form release agent/oil; concrete may bond to forms causing surface defects, difficulty stripping, damage. Actions: apply appropriate release agent to all form surfaces before concrete placement; inspect. Rationale. References: ACI 347. Use value 0 as no numeric reading. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty. confidence high 0.95. Ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Form surfaces were not oiled/treated with a release agent prior to concrete placement.",
    "Concrete will likely adhere to the forms, causing surface defects, difficult stripping, and possible form damage.",
    "Condition violates ACI 347 formwork preparation requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Apply an approved form-release agent to all form surfaces in accordance with ACI 347 and manufacturer requirements.",
    "Re-inspect all formed surfaces before concrete placement to verify complete, uniform coverage.",
    "Remove any contamination or ponded release agent prior to pour."
  ],
  "rationale": "ACI 347 requires formwork surfaces to be prepared with a suitable release agent to prevent concrete bonding, protect form surfaces, and produce acceptable concrete finishes. Forms that are not oiled at the rough-complete stage are non-compliant and defective because they cannot perform as required during stripping and finishing.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347"
  ]
}
